questions.question: Implement a singly linked list in C. List the methods that each node should have, and explain the time complexity of each method. Provide example usage of the linked list.
questions.hint: Use pointer arithmetic to traverse the linked list

questions.question: Write a C function to check if a given polynomial is represented as a linked list. If yes, print the coefficients of the polynomial. If not, print a message indicating that the polynomial is not represented as a linked list.
questions.hint: Use a pointer to the head of the linked list and iterate through it to check the coefficients

questions.question: Design a C implementation for a stack using a singly linked list. Provide methods for push, pop, peek, and check if the stack is empty. Explain the time complexity of each method.
questions.hint: Use a pointer to the top of the stack and update the top pointer accordingly
